## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between growthx.ai and AirDev for AI-driven prototype development and web development projects.](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai seeks a developer to create AI-generated prototypes (10-15 hrs/week) using Bolt.new, with potential for broader web development work](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [AirDev specializes in web software development using AI and no-code tools, but the proposed project scope differs from their typical engagements](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Time estimates for prototype creation (1-2/hr) may be unrealistic; AirDev suggests recalibrating expectations](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Both parties agree to reassess fit: growthx.ai to clarify broader development needs, AirDev to evaluate prototype project feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

## Topics

### Current Project Needs: AI-Driven Prototyping

  - [growthx.ai seeks developer for 10-15 hrs/week to create prototypes using Bolt.new](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Tasks: Generate prototypes, fact-check outputs, review auto-generated how-to articles](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Expectation: 1-2 prototypes/hour, 5-30 prototypes weekly (deemed unrealistic by AirDev)](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Project types: Landing pages, internal tools, apps (e.g., task managers, CRMs)](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [growthx.ai provides master prompts and guidelines to streamline process](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### Workflow and Output Examples

  - [One-shot prompts generate comprehensive outputs (e.g., Things 3 clone)](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Developers would use master prompts to map ideas to Bolt.new categories](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Key editing focuses on general description and key priorities](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Final output includes prototype and associated how-to article](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

### Project Context and Management

  - [growthx.ai set initial strategy but lacks capacity for ongoing management](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Seeking to delegate prototype creation while maintaining high-level oversight](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Editorial team handles article generation; hired person to fact-check](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [growthx.ai to conduct final review of deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

### AirDev's Capabilities and Concerns

  - [Specializes in web software development using AI and no-code tools](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Concerned about unrealistic time expectations for prototype creation](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Typically allocates more time for client projects (e.g., 30 hours for a week-long project)](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Suggests recalibrating expectations or considering alternative solutions (e.g., freelancers)](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Potential for Broader Collaboration

  - [growthx.ai hints at general engineering needs across various clients and project types](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [AirDev expresses interest in exploring larger-scale web development opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Both parties agree to reassess fit based on clarified needs and capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

## Next Steps

  - [AirDev to evaluate feasibility of prototype project and respond within 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [growthx.ai to gather more information on broader development needs from client leads and team leads](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussion on alternative collaboration opportunities if prototype project isn't a fit](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [If moving forward, discuss qualification process and potential test project for interested developers](https://fathom.video/share/MgUcSNrY6pGrtbhiEZjiEovAQ4p3TsYp?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
